posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community!

Thank you to those that joined our community event with Oded and Michael and learned about mondayDB , the new data infrastructure powering your boards. I hoped you also enjoyed the exciting sneak peek of whats to come.

As always, we want to hear your feedback and are here for any questions. You have feedback or a question about board infrastructure, share below!

Hope to see you all at another community event soon.
